name: Chili Powder
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup crushed hot red pepper flakes
1 tablespoon cayenne or more to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems and most of the seeds from the chili peppers.
2. Shred the peppers coarsely.
3. Add all ingredients to a blender and blend until powdered.
4. Let the chili powder settle before removing the cover of the blender.
